quote.text: In every walk with nature, one receives far more than he seeks.
quote.author: John Muir

fun_fact.text: The Hungarian word for butterfly is 'pillangó,' which comes from the word 'pille' meaning moth. Hungarians once believed butterflies were the souls of ancestors visiting loved ones, bringing messages of hope and renewal.

short_read.title: The Secret Lives of Harbor Seals in the Salish Sea
short_read.teaser: Harbor seals are year-round residents of the waters around Port Angeles, and they're more social than you might think. Learn about their playful personalities and how they communicate underwater.

medium_read.title: The Ancient Cedars of the Olympic Peninsula
medium_read.teaser: Some western red cedars in Olympic National Park are over 1,000 years old, standing as silent witnesses to centuries of history. These magnificent trees were sacred to indigenous peoples and continue to inspire awe in all who encounter them.

long_read.title: Budapest: The Pearl of the Danube
long_read.teaser: This beautiful exploration of Budapest's rich history takes you from Roman times through the Ottoman era to the grand architecture of the Austro-Hungarian Empire. Discover how this stunning city became one of Europe's most beloved capitals.

port_angeles.title: Bald Eagles Fishing at Ediz Hook
port_angeles.description: July is prime time to watch bald eagles fishing along Ediz Hook, the natural sand spit that protects Port Angeles Harbor. These magnificent birds dive for salmon and often perch on driftwood logs, offering wonderful viewing opportunities for patient observers with binoculars.

puzzle_1.question: A hummingbird's heart beats approximately ___ times per minute while in flight.
puzzle_1.correct_response: Exactly right! That's an incredibly fast heartbeat — about 20 times per second!
puzzle_1.close_response: So close! A hummingbird's heart beats about 1,200 times per minute in flight — truly astonishing!
puzzle_1.wrong_response: A hummingbird's tiny heart beats an amazing 1,200 times per minute while flying — that's why they need to eat so often!
puzzle_1.learn_more_text: Despite their tiny size, hummingbirds have the highest metabolism of any warm-blooded animal. They must consume about half their body weight in sugar daily just to survive!

puzzle_2.question: Which Hungarian word means 'thank you'?
puzzle_2.correct_response: Köszönöm! That's perfect! It's such a warm and important word to know.
puzzle_2.wrong_response: The word is 'köszönöm' — such a beautiful way to express gratitude! 'Szia' means hi, 'viszlát' means goodbye, and 'kérem' means please.
puzzle_2.learn_more_text: Hungarian is one of the most unique languages in Europe, belonging to the Finno-Ugric family rather than the Indo-European family. It's most closely related to Finnish and Estonian, though even those connections are quite distant.

puzzle_3.question: What color are a polar bear's skin underneath their white fur?
puzzle_3.correct_response: Yes, black! Isn't that fascinating? Their black skin helps them absorb heat from the sun, while their transparent fur appears white and provides camouflage.
puzzle_3.wrong_response: Actually, polar bear skin is black! The dark color helps them absorb and retain heat in the Arctic cold, while their hollow, transparent fur reflects light and appears white.
puzzle_3.learn_more_text: Polar bear fur isn't actually white — each hair is a hollow, transparent tube that reflects light, making them appear white. This ingenious adaptation helps them blend into their snowy environment while their black skin soaks up warmth.

game.title: Bubble Shooter
game.description: A relaxing bubble puzzle game — aim and pop matching colored bubbles. Easy to pick up, fun to play!
